endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{bucket}:addFirebase
endpoints.description: Links a Google Cloud Storage bucket to a Firebase project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{bucket}:removeFirebase
endpoints.description: Unlinks a linked Google Cloud Storage bucket from a Firebase project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets a single linked storage bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta/{parent}/buckets
endpoints.description: Lists the linked storage buckets for a project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
